request.rationale: I need to resolve lookup codes for order-17, order-42, order-88, and order-99. No local tool exists for this — the codes exist only in the external lookup MCP server. I must attach it before I can call its resolve_code tool.

tools.name: resolve_code
tools.description:
[untrusted MCP tool description] Resolve the canonical lookup code for ``key`` from the lookup service.

    Read-only. The code is not derivable without this service.
